title: loxogramme lineata
intro: Loxogramme lineata, also known as the Striped Fern or Lineate Loxogramme, is a species of fern in the family Loxogrammaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, reducing fever, and relieving pain. The health benefits of Loxogramme lineata include its ability to improve digestion, reduce menstrual cramps, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Loxogramme lineata is often used in teas, infusions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties and alleviate various health issues.
